series_metadata.series_description: Records include estimates for jobs, monthly recap of invoices by Marketing Project Authorization (MPA) number, proposals, etc.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain digital copy for six (6) years and one (1) day after termination of the contract, review for administrative value, then delete. ; Paper: Retain hard copy in the operating area for six (6) years and one (1) day after termination of the contract, review for administrative value, then destroy., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
